name: Asian Pay Television Trust
summary: Asian Pay Television Trust owns, operates, and maintains pay-TV and broadband businesses in Taiwan, Hong Kong, Japan, and Singapore. It provides basic cable TV and premium digital cable TV services; and high-speed broadband services, as well as electronic program guide data. The company serves households, other system operators, and third party customers. It serves approximately 1.2 million homes. Asian Pay Television Trust was founded in 1999 and is based in Singapore.
